titleStmt.title: SII 23.145: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 145. (A.R. No. 145 of 1907.) Pūvālaikkuḍi, Tirumayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District Rock-cut cave—on the same wall Par. Rājēndradēva: year 5: 1055-56 A.D.

summary.p: This begins with the introduction Tirumagaḷ maruviya etc. It is a mutilated record registering a gift of cows for a perpetual lamp in the temple of Mahādēva at Pūvālaikkuḍi by Iḷamagaṉ Attāṇi Nāvaṟku[ḍaiyan]••••• Śoḻa-Tennavadiyaraiyaṉ of Koṟṟamaṅgalam for the merit of his elder brother. The donor is evidently the same as the one mentioned in No. 143 above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷ maruviya ceṅkol ventaṉ
noṉ ceṉai piṉnatuvāka munnetirceṉṟiraṭṭapāṭi purattu jayastampa
raṭṭā Etirpeṟa teṇṭicaivaiyil paṟaiyatu kalaṅka laṉ Aṭaṟ ceṉai El
lām purantu nikaḻap pacumpiṇamāka Aṅkatu kaṇṭu Ākava ṉaiyuṅ kutirai yum O
viraikaḷum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum koṇṭu vijaiya Abhiṣe ntaruḷiya kopparakecaripan
marāṉa Uṭaiyār śrī rājendradevaṟku yāṇṭu 5Āvatu ḷi nāṭṭu kūṭalūrnāṭṭu pūvā
laikkuṭi koṟṟamaṅkalattu Iḷamakaṉ Attāṇi nāvaṟku� coḻat tenṉavatiyarayane
n Eṉ tamaiyanār Attāṇi kalaṉāṉa muṭikkoṇṭacoḻapala hāde varkku vaitta
tirunontāviḷakku Oṉṟukku nicatam Uḻakku ney Irupattañcu Ivai kai
k koṇṭu nicata muḻakku ney Aṭṭakaṭavāṉāṉen Innā nāna cun=taracoḻakoneṉ
Ivaṉukku nirnilam Ivvūr tevar vayalil cun=tarivaya vayakkal kal veṭṭik kuṭutteṉ
t tennavatiyaraiyaneṉ Ivviḷakkiṉ per cū
Digital edition of SII 23.145 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
